steps.title: Identify the percentage calculation needed
steps.content: Alex's bill is \$30.00 and the tip is 10% of this amount. To find 10% of a number, we multiply by 0.10.

steps.title: Calculate the tip amount
steps.content:
$$0.10 \times 30 = 3$$
The tip amount is \$3.00. That matches choice B — B is correct.
